titleStmt.title: SII 18.186: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 186. (B.K. No. 79 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Purada Siddhēśvara.

summary.p: This badly damaged record refers to Rāyamurāri Sōmēśvara and registers some gifts for the worship of god Siddhēśa made by Māyiyaṇa-Chamūpati. It mentions. Siddhapayya-Daṇḍanāyaka, a subordinate of the king.
A reference has also been made to Bijjaṇa as vanquishing the enemies

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) namaḥstuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē © sarbba jña śriṣṭikartāra śaṁkaThe letter [r]bba is written below the line.
ra śaśibhūṣaṇa pāyā kaḷaturivaṁśābdān trurya
kṣmāraṇakṣamaḥ . kaḻaturyyavaṁśadādiyoḷeḷegadhipatiThe verse is very corrupt. The text
yenisi vēra bijjaṇabhūpaṁ kaḷakuḷamāgiḻidadaṭaranaḷavaḍisiye naḍautira
luvātana tanaya . kadanakurkkida vīrārātinriparaṁ saṁgrāmaraṁgāgradoḷu madava
ddaṁtiyalaṭṭi muṭṭi taleyaṁ seṁḍāḍi vikhyātadiṁ puduvaṁ māṇisi
bhūmiyaṁ taḷadanēkacchatradiṁ lōkadoḷu vidhitaṁ rāyamurāri śūdruka
nripaṁ sōmēsvarōrbbīsvaraṁ . tatupādapadmarādhakaṁ siddhapayyadaṁḍanāya
kara mahimōṁnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . baṁdane kēḷagastyamunipuṁgavari
ddeḍeyettalattaluṁ kaṁdamenippavolu negardda rājasabhāṁntaramadhya
dalli taṁnneṁdude mātu māḍidude [ke�]ydakritaṁ nuḍi śāsanaṁ
jagakkeṁdaḍide vuṁnnati siddhapadaṁḍanāthanā . prītiya
putraṁ bhuvana ripukuḷāṁtakaṁ samarajayōdyōtanene
cikkaṁ vikrama dhīśaṁ gaṁḍaragaṁḍaṁ ripukuḻagaṁḍaṁ sa
marapracaṁḍaṁ du ci
kka māyidē masta
karatuna teṟadoḷu
Eseva na ṁ pasurvva
ṇnadagiḷi mattaṁ dakṣiṇa
vārāṇāsi ḷāsa ddhanāthamahēśana kṣē
tramaṁ manadi ḍu . viditaṁ siddhēśana nijapadakamaḻada pūjegeṁdu
māyicamūpaṁ mudadi biṭṭaṁ puṇyāḻpadamāgalu bēṟevēṟe dha
rmmada teṟanaṁ . mattamadāvāva dharmmameṁteṁdaḍe .
Aḍakege vaḍḍarāvuḷada suṁka lele bhāradoḷu taḍeyaṇami
lla dhānyadeḍeyoḻu taḍeya yvatettinoḷe
ṭhāṇayugaṁ teṟusuṁkava māyiya
ṇacamūpati
paddhatiyaṁ nō
ddhatiyaṁ paḍegu brahmakaḻpāṁtarama . siddhēśana dharmmamu ta
veneṁdu manadinaḷiyalu bagevaṁ durggatiyoḷēḷu narakada paddha
tiyoḷu krimiyenikku kaḷpāṁtaradoḷu . nālnūrvvarśvāmiga
ḷu sarbbaveḷasavī ṭhāṇadoḷkuḷirddu biṭṭa dharmma Ayvatettina karavaḍa māṁnya .
Digital edition of SII 18.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
